name: Forex.com
description_short: Leading US-regulated forex broker by StoneX Group with tight spreads, advanced platforms, and access to 80+ currency pairs.
description_long:
Forex.com is one of the most established forex brokers globally, operated by StoneX Group (formerly GAIN Capital). Available to US traders and regulated by the CFTC/NFA, it offers access to over 80 currency pairs along with gold, silver, and other commodities through CFDs (outside the US).

The platform provides three trading interfaces: the proprietary Advanced Trading platform with integrated research and analysis, MetaTrader 4 and 5, and TradingView integration. The Advanced Trading platform features performance analytics, advanced charting, market analysis from Trading Central, and customizable workspaces.

Forex.com offers two pricing models: Standard accounts with spreads from 1.0 pips and no commission, or Commission accounts with raw spreads from 0.0 pips plus $5 per 100K traded. Active traders benefit from cash rebates through the Active Trader program, which offers up to 15% reduction in costs based on monthly trading volume.
pros: Two pricing models to suit different trading styles
Active Trader cashback rebates for volume traders
cons: Limited to forex and metals for US clients
Standard spreads are wider than some competitors
Platform can feel complex for beginners
unique_selling_points: US-regulated forex broker by StoneX Group
meta_description: Leading US-regulated forex broker by StoneX Group with tight spreads, advanced platforms, and access to 80+ currency pairs.
